summary: v2.10 cluster fully verified — Dashboard Loan Summary widget, FloatingDock (quick-add/search/ai/sync) on every page, Task attachments upload/list/delete with 4MB cap, and TaskIn.parent_id + cascade delete. 4/4 new backend pytests + 20/20 v22 regression pass; frontend dock+loan-card+attachments dialog confirmed across all 6 pages.

issues: Loan Summary card 'next HDFC in 1008 days' reads slightly awkward — consider 'HDFC due Feb 15, 2029' for clarity (non-blocking).

critical_code_review_comments: FloatingDock.jsx — clean, isolated component with heartbeat to /api/. Note: api.get('/') will hit REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api/ (axios baseURL prepends /api). Status dot stays green in normal flow as expected.

Cascade delete in delete_task uses delete_many({parent_id: task_id}) BEFORE delete_one(task) — correct order, also calls _compact_sr afterwards. One-level cascade only (grandchildren orphan if any). Add a recursive delete if you support nested subtasks deeper than 1 level later.

Attachment endpoint enforces 4MB per file BEFORE adding to list AND 8MB total AFTER adding — correct order. However, the 4MB check happens after reading the full upload into memory; consider streaming + early bail via Content-Length header for very large uploads (non-blocking).
loan-summary EMI auto-calc: when both emi field and (rate, repayment_date) are present, uses stored emi which is what user expects. Good.
Tasks.jsx attachment dialog uses standard <input type='file'> — no drag/drop yet. UX could be improved later.
server.py is still ~3060 lines (carried tech debt). Suggest splitting routers in next pass.
seed_data_creation: No new seed left behind. Tests create TEST_PARENT/TEST_CHILD/TEST_ATT_TASK_1/TEST_ATT_BIG and tear them all down. The pre-existing HDFC liability (EMI 2500) remains untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2.10 fully green. Backend: 4 new pytests in test_v210.py — TestLoanSummary (shape + active>=1 + emi>0), TestAttachments (upload+list+delete round-trip via GET /api/tasks, plus 5MB→413 cap), TestSubtasksCascade (direct POST with parent_id, then parent DELETE cascades child). All passing. NOTE: Backend endpoint to query transactions is GET /api/transactions (not /api/cashflow) — corrected this in my test. Frontend confirmed via Playwright: (1) loan-summary-card on Dashboard shows '₹2,500 / month · 1 active loan · next HDFC in 1008 days'. (2) floating-dock with all 4 testids (dock-quick-add, dock-search, dock-ai, dock-sync[data-sync-status=green]) renders on Dashboard, Tasks, Routines, CashFlow, Notes, Reminders (Routines required 3s settle wait). (3) Clicking dock-quick-add opens quick-add-modal; dock-search opens cmd-palette; dock-ai opens ai-chat-panel. (4) Old testids open-quick-add-sidebar, open-cmd-palette-sidebar, ai-chat-toggle are all REMOVED. (5) Tasks page shows 6+ rows each with task-attach-<id> paperclip; clicking opens task-attach-dialog containing task-attach-input. (6) v2.9 regression: export-tasks-btn still present and v22 pytests (20/20) still green. The 'Ctrl+K via dispatched KeyboardEvent' from dock-search works in Playwright Chromium — but if you ever see flaky behaviour, the fallback is real Ctrl+K which also works.
